note: THE JOIN TABLE. A THEME binds the 4 independent vectors: Color, Typography, Forms, and Spacing. Apps reference a THEME slug via THEMES.applyTheme(slug) and the resolver composes all four. schemaVersion 3 (2026-07-19): confirmed 4-pointer shape end-to-end + added composed utility themes now that resolve.js actually applies every vector.

vocabulary.color: entity — the palette (hue only). e.g. maw-dark-utility.
vocabulary.typography: entity — fonts + size ramp + tracking. e.g. sharp-racing.
vocabulary.forms: entity — tactility: radii, border weight, shadows, elevation, motion, gradient angle. sharp | soft | grounded.
vocabulary.spacing: entity — density: touch target, padding, gaps. tight | standard | loose.
vocabulary.theme: JOIN — named combination of exactly one token from each of the four vectors.

themes.name: Sharp Utility
themes.intendedUse: Tight instrument/data look — the sleek dashboard direction (Retrocast).

themes.name: Soft Utility
themes.intendedUse: Balanced everyday default for new apps copied from template-app.

themes.name: Sharp Carbon
themes.intendedUse: Neutral-cool tight instrument look; alternative to sharp-utility.
